description: Replace the existing 'Next Notification' sidebar button with a two-row cluster: (1) a renamed 'Waiting Agent' button with off-white lit-state inversion and gold hairline accent, and (2) a horizontally-split row of filled-triangle up/down workspace navigation buttons. Full design spec at docs/c11-waiting-agent-cluster-plan.md. Key decisions: off-white paper fill on lit (not solid yellow), void-fill paper-white-glyph rest state, gold-stroke hover for arrows, thin gold hairline on lit Waiting Agent, two-tier adaptive sizing (drop shortcut first then halve both rows), no wraparound on nav, press-and-hold auto-repeat.
title: Sidebar cluster: Waiting Agent button + workspace nav arrows
